single.name: Single Card
single.description: A whisper of fate — draw one card and hear what the universe has to say right now.
single.suitable_for: Daily inspiration, quick intuition, when a simple question lingers in your mind

positions.name: Daily Guidance
positions.description: The omen the stars have lit for this moment

past_present_future.name: Past / Present / Future
past_present_future.description: Three veils of time — part the mist of the past, gaze upon the truth of now, and glimpse the river of destiny flowing forward.
past_present_future.suitable_for: Wanting to know how things will unfold, tracing the arc of a relationship, seeing the full story of a situation

positions.name: Past
positions.description: Seeds planted in the past, still quietly shaping this moment

positions.name: Present
positions.description: The crossroads where you stand right now

positions.name: Future
positions.description: What lies ahead if you follow the current path

situation_action_result.name: Situation / Action / Result
situation_action_result.description: Keys to insight — see through the fog you're in, find the action that breaks through, and foresee the light of outcome.
situation_action_result.suitable_for: Facing a decision, wanting to know how to act, needing to see the consequences of a choice

positions.name: Situation
positions.description: The reality you're in, which may not be what it seems

positions.name: Action
positions.description: The step destiny hints you should take

positions.name: Result
positions.description: Where this path leads if you follow it through

body_mind_spirit.name: Body / Mind / Spirit
body_mind_spirit.description: Triple resonance of body, mind, and spirit — examine your state across these three dimensions and rediscover inner balance.
body_mind_spirit.suitable_for: Feeling drained and wanting to realign, seeking deeper self-understanding, looking for balance and direction in life

positions.name: Body
positions.description: What your physical world and body are going through

positions.name: Mind
positions.description: The undercurrents surging through your thoughts and emotions

positions.name: Spirit
positions.description: The truth your intuition and spirit are whispering

five_card_cross.name: Five Card Cross
five_card_cross.description: Revelation of the star-cross — five cards weave the full picture of a dilemma: present, obstacle, foundation, past, and guidance.
five_card_cross.suitable_for: Complex situations needing multi-angle analysis, wanting to find the root of a problem, seeking comprehensive guidance rather than a single answer

positions.description: Where you stand in the swirl right now

positions.description: The shadow and trials blocking your path

positions.name: Foundation
positions.description: The hidden root beneath the surface

positions.name: Past

positions.name: Guidance
